overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from a sci-fi survival game. The player character rides an industrial elevator, traverses a high-tech facility with atmospheric lighting, explores a circular atrium with a central tree, and discovers a deceased figure in maintenance corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: caged industrial elevator with mesh walls

events.description: character interacts with level selection panel, selecting floor A0
elevator interior shifts from teal ambient to red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: standing in elevator cage, pressing level selection button, and waiting for ascent while looking around

entered.detail: metal mesh elevator cage with industrial safety barriers
digital interface displaying floor options A0 and B1 with warning stripes
grid-patterned metal safety walls surrounding the elevator platform

segments.scene_description: The character stands inside a caged industrial elevator with metal mesh walls. The lighting shifts from teal to red emergency mode as the character interacts with the level selection panel to choose floor A0.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with yellow lighting

events.description: elevator doors open revealing industrial corridor beyond
character exits elevator and begins walking through corridor toward atrium

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator cage and walking through a narrow industrial corridor with yellow overhead lighting

entered.detail: narrow hallway with warm yellow overhead lights and metal wall panels
heavy bulkhead door with circular locking mechanism and warning labels

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors open to reveal a narrow industrial corridor illuminated by yellow overhead lights. The character exits the elevator and walks toward a heavy security door at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular atrium with central tree and holographic displays

events.description: character enters large circular atrium from narrow corridor
holographic TERRA sign becomes visible on the far wall

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular atrium, observing the central tree and holographic displays on the walls

entered.detail: large tree with pink blossoms growing in a circular raised planter
glowing holographic display showing TERRA text and triangular logo
raised platform with integrated ground lighting surrounding the tree
elevated metal walkway with railings visible above the main floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious circular atrium featuring a large tree with pink blossoms at its center. The character walks around the space, passing by a glowing TERRA hologram on the far wall and observing the upper catwalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridor with emergency red lighting

events.description: character approaches and examines deceased figure slumped against wall
corridor lighting shifts to deep red emergency mode

agents.ego_description: discovering a dead body near a security door, examining it closely, then proceeding through red-lit maintenance corridors

notable_agents.action: deceased figure in green uniform slumped against wall near fire extinguisher

entered.detail: red emergency fire suppression unit mounted on concrete wall
tall dark metal storage lockers lining the corridor walls
overhead lighting fixtures casting intense red glow throughout the passage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a security door where a deceased figure lies slumped against the wall near a fire extinguisher. After examining the body, the character proceeds through maintenance corridors lined with lockers, where the lighting shifts to an intense red emergency mode.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of an industrial elevator into a sprawling botanical atrium and finally into grim maintenance corridors. It begins inside a caged elevator where the lighting shifts from teal to a red emergency glow as the character selects a floor. As the doors open, the camera follows the character through a narrow corridor bathed in yellow light toward a heavy security door. The scene then expands into a spacious circular atrium centered around a large tree with pink blossoms, passing a glowing TERRA hologram and open catwalks. Finally, the camera moves toward a slumped deceased figure by a security door before proceeding into locker-lined maintenance halls where the lighting returns to an intense emergency red.
